Text.Page: I have another favor, if you'd be willing to grant me just a bit more of your time.<NEXTPAGEBUTTON>"What do you need?"</NEXTPAGEBUTTON>

Grain prices have really shot up in Thrallfield. I was planning to buy up all the expensive grain out there, then sell it at a loss here. Just to help out, you know.

I was expecting a delivery two days ago, and it hasn't arrived.

Can you go meet up with Regik and see what the hold-up is? Please?

Digory sent you, eh? Well, he's looking for those sacks right there, I'm sure. Bought low from the locals, and intends to sell high over in Velika.

Profiteering scoundrel.
